_comment: Feature claiming system. Before building any feature, an agent or developer MUST claim it here via a PR that updates this file. Prevents two agents building the same thing. Claimed features show agent_id and branch. Released = merged to develop.
_instructions: To claim: set status='claimed', add your agent_id (e.g. 'claude-dev-1' or 'fatima-laptop'), branch, and claimed_at. To release: set status='released', add released_at after your PR merges.

backend_auth_system.description: JWT auth, hotel registration, API key generation + SHA-256 hashing

backend_referral_fanout.description: POST /v1/referrals, asyncio fanout, Redis cache, timeout handling

backend_availability_api.description: GET /v1/availability, POST /v1/hotels/availability, Redis TTL cache layer

backend_handshake_system.description: HMAC handshake code generator, offline validation endpoint, Celery SMS dispatch

backend_database_schema.description: Alembic migrations: platform schema, hotel private schemas, RLS policies, PostGIS

backend_celery_workers.description: Celery app setup, webhook queue with exponential backoff, SMS worker

frontend_landing_page.description: Marketing landing page, English + Amharic, mobile-first, conversion CTA

frontend_emergency_referral_ui.description: 3-tap Emergency Referral Mode, results list, trust score display

frontend_availability_grid.description: Visual room availability toggle grid for dashboard-tier hotels

frontend_onboarding_kyc.description: Hotel KYC registration flow, document upload, sandbox activation screen

frontend_dashboard_core.description: Hotel dashboard main page, room status, referral inbox, real-time 10s auto-refresh, trust score display

integration_api_client.description: Typed API client (api.ts), auth token interceptor, React Query hooks for all Phase 1 endpoints

deployment_seed_and_config.description: backend/scripts/seed_demo_data.py, railway.toml, vercel.json, env templates, /status and /health routes

frontend_pwa_offline.description: Service Worker setup, IndexedDB cache for 50 referrals, offline banner, local code validation

infrastructure_docker.description: Dockerfiles for backend + frontend, docker-compose.yml, init_db.sql

infrastructure_ci_github_actions.description: GitHub Actions CI: lint, type-check, test, build for backend + frontend
